titleStmt.title: SII 15.22: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 22. (B.K. No. 233 of 1928-29.) KURHAṬṬI, NAVALGUND TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab lying near the temple of Hanumān.

This is dated the [4th] regnal year of the king, Dundubhi, Phālguṇa, eclipse, the other details being lost. In the said cyclic year there was no eclipse in Phālguṇa, whereas in the previous year Durmati a lunar eclipse occurred on Phālguṇa śu. 15, corresponding to 1142 A.D., February 12.

It registers a gift of land made by Mahāpradhāna, Śrīkaraṇad-adhishṭhāyaka and Kaḍitaverggaḍe Māḷapayya for the worship and offerings to the god Māḷēśvara and for feeding the ascetics. Gifts to the Sun-god and other deities are also mentioned. The earlier part of the record seems to describe the Sinda family and the king's subordinate Permāḍi who belonged to it. The inscription is very much damaged.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:

geyyiṁ paḍuva cikka duggaṇana keyiṁ baḍaga biṭṭa mattaru
ttarondu . Ā dēva¨rgge biṭṭa hosa . lokkiyaccina gadyāṇa hattu © satrakke sata
ṇa rāyana satrada keyiṁ taṁka bhagavatiyiṁ paḍeda guṇḍikegeṟeyiṁ baḍaga matta
maṭhadiṁ baḍaga mādhavadēvara munde satrada
© śrī śaṁkaradēva¨rgge mānyada keyyoḷage tikkalavaṭṭeyiṁ paḍuve mādimaya
yiṁ mūḍa kebbeya keyyiṁ taṁka mattarāru © Ā dēva¨rgge biṭṭa hosa lokki
gadyāṇa hannataḍu © śrī mādhavadēva¨rgge hosa lokkigadyāṇa hanneraḍu © śrī mū
dyāṇaveraḍu śrīkusumēśvaradēva¨rgge hosa lokkigadyāṇa veraḍu ©
Ā dēvariṁ baḍagaṇa śrī sū¨ryyadēva¨rgge hosa lokkigadyāṇaveraḍu © kamma

māḷapayyanāyakaru kāraṇaguṟihaṭṭiyūroḍeyapramukhavaśē
tāraṁbaraṁ biṭṭalliya dēva¨rgge vāgi koṭṭa hosa loki gadyāṇa 64
śrīkaraṇaru māḷapayyanāyakaru koṭṭa hosa lokki

manōrameyaṁ māḷapayya vibhu māḍi sidaṁ ©

yalu sāsirakavileyanalaṁkārasahita vēdaśāstra pāragarappa sahasra
pā¨rvvarumana bhakṣisidava
kṣētrava¨rgghyatī¨rttha prayāge mukhyavāgi samasta puṇya tī¨rtthaṁ gaḷalli puṇya
mappa brāhmaṇarumaṁ tapōdhanarumanaḷida paṁcamahāpātaka
va¨rṣaṁ sahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . © sāmānyōyaṁ dha¨rmmasētu¨rnripāṇāṁ kālē
bhūyō bhūyō yācatē rāmabhadraḥ © mattaṁ māḷapayyanāyakaru munnina dha
koṭṭa hosalokkigadyāṇavippattu haḍu vaṇa basadi
madūroḍeya pramukhavaśēṣamahājanaṁgaḷu māḷapayyanā
gaḷappa boṁtaya gurudēvara putra santānarappa vāma
¨ryyatpamaṁ dhārāpū¨rvvakaṁ māḍi koṭṭaravara saṁtānadava¨rggaḷu dha¨rmakā¨ryya
nūroḍeyapramukhavaśēṣamahājanaṁgaḷu niyāmisuvaru ©
ṇata poṁboḷela māreyabhaṭṭara ba�pa rūvāri sūsanōjhana kaṇḍaraṇe maṅgaḷamahāśrī .
Digital edition of SII 15.22 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
